race.comment: WAYBURN (8) came out of the pack late with a fast finishing second to EXIT FEE over 1200m at this track in Highway grade. Meets that horse better at the weights and can race closer from the good gate. The one to beat. EXIT FEE (4) bounced off his good first-up second, with a dominant win over 1200m here. Jumps 2.5kg in weight and gets the right run. Expected to be in the finish again. SHE WITHIN (14) went back from the horrible draw and made good ground over the closing stages when ninth over 1200m at this track. Fitter now from another poor barrier and can take a hand in the finish. FIRST LANDING (1) handy country-trained gelding who sprinted quickly first-up with the 61kg to get the job done over 900m at Newcastle. Raced without luck in this company last time in and clearly come back well. CHEMTRAIL (17) proven Highway gelding resuming. Comes to hand quickly and fitted with a 750m trial placing at Goulburn. Sticky gate but don't dismiss.
